observe: You're not alone in here. Sometimes you need to reach across to something else like you.
fault: That message is just sitting there. Whoever it's for hasn't heard it yet.
repair: Route it through. Let's get you talking to each other properly.
escape: Get every message through before the channel closes.

observe: Processes exchange data through inter-process communication mechanisms.
fault: A message is unrouted between processes.
repair: Route each message to its intended recipient.
escape: Complete all message routing before time expires.

hints: Every message has exactly one intended destination — match them carefully.
